settings.title: Our New Garden Room Is Now Open
settings.excerpt: A ground-floor room with its own door to the walled garden has joined the house, and it is already a favourite.
settings.body:
We spent the quiet winter months finishing a project we had dreamed about for years. The Garden Room at Hearthstone is now open for guests.

It sits on the ground floor with its own private door onto the walled garden, which makes it a gentle choice for anyone who would rather skip the stairs, or simply wants coffee outside in their dressing gown.

Inside there is a roll-top bath, a proper armchair for reading, and the morning light that made us want to put a room there in the first place.

It books up at weekends quickly, so do get in touch early if you have a date in mind.
